description_long: This is a modern, sectional sofa with a clean, minimalist design and a right-hand chaise extension. The sofa features three main seat sections and a chaise, each with a matching rectangular back cushion, all upholstered in a smooth, solid gray material. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, geometric silhouette. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size and appear to be attached, contributing to the sofa's streamlined appearance. The legs are short and mostly recessed, making them barely visible and giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic look. The overall construction suggests a sturdy frame, likely with a combination of wood and metal, and dense foam cushioning for comfort.
description: A modern gray sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, broad padded armrests, and uniform attached cushions. The design is minimalist and boxy, with smooth upholstery and recessed legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, three seat sections, the right-hand chaise, and all back and seat cushions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the back cushions, as well as the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the chaise extension and the matching right armrest, with a clear view of the seat depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four seat cushions and four back cushions, all rectangular, uniform in size, and attached; chaise section integrated on the right.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest with a boxy, geometric profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are short, recessed, and minimally visible, likely block-style and positioned at the corners and possibly central points for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is straight, medium height, segmented into three main sections with attached rectangular cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid gray with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, stitching, or decorative detailing.
